extern "C" {
    fn malloc(size: usize) -> *mut u8;
    fn free(ptr: *mut u8);
    fn strlen(s: *const u8) -> usize;
    fn memcpy(dest: *mut u8, src: *const u8, n: usize) -> *mut u8;
}

extern "system" {
    fn GetLastError() -> u32;
    fn CreateFileA(name: *const u8, access: u32, share: u32, sec: *mut u8, disp: u32, flags: u32, template: *mut u8) -> isize;
}
